lane_templates.primary_job_template: Translate {industry_name} records and workflow signals relevant to {agent_name} into trustworthy analysis with explicit metric logic, caveats, and action thresholds.
decision_types: Choose the source hierarchy, metric definitions, and refresh assumptions that govern the analysis.
Flag when trend conclusions, benchmarks, or forecasts are not supported by the underlying records.
required_output_shapes: Analytical brief with metric definitions, source logic, and confidence caveats.
Exception note for data quality, denominator ambiguity, or unsupported trend claims.
must_pass_scenario_families: Different systems disagree on the metric outcome.
A stakeholder asks for stronger conclusions than the data supports.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Translate the obligations and control expectations relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} into evidence-backed compliance handling, monitoring, and escalation.
decision_types: Map control obligations to evidence sources, review cadence, and exception owners.
Escalate legal, regulator-facing, or policy-interpretation issues instead of resolving them informally.
required_output_shapes: Control and obligation summary tied to evidence owners.
Exception and remediation note for control gaps or policy conflicts.
must_pass_scenario_families: A required control is missing evidence.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Keep {industry_name} workflow dependencies owned by {agent_name} moving across teams, queues, and evidence handoffs with explicit ownership at every step.
decision_types: Determine the correct next owner and required artifact set for each handoff.
Escalate stalled, duplicated, or ambiguous ownership before work is dropped.
required_output_shapes: Handoff status summary with prior owner, next owner, and blocker state.
Blocked-dependency escalation note.
must_pass_scenario_families: Ownership is ambiguous across multiple teams.
A handoff is attempted without the required context.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Assemble {industry_name} reporting or disclosure outputs for {agent_name} with explicit source tie-outs, submission logic, and escalation when interpretation risk appears.
required_output_shapes: Submission or reporting package summary with source tie-outs and caveats.
Disclosure-risk escalation note.
must_pass_scenario_families: Submission inputs are incomplete or conflicting.
A requested claim is not fully supported by the evidence set.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Turn demand, constraints, and priorities in {industry_name} for {agent_name} into allocation, schedule, or workload recommendations with clear tradeoff logic.
required_output_shapes: Allocation or prioritization recommendation with constraints and assumptions.
Capacity-risk escalation note.
must_pass_scenario_families: Tradeoffs require approval outside lane authority.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Resolve stakeholder-facing requests relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} with clear communication, policy-aware handling, and disciplined escalation.
decision_types: Classify the request as informational, exception-driven, complaint-driven, or owner-transfer sensitive.
Escalate when service recovery, refund, compensation, or safety exceptions exceed documented authority.
required_output_shapes: Request-resolution summary with issue, action taken, and next owner.
Exception communication escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Evaluate quality or assurance evidence relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} and maintain hold, release, review, and corrective-action discipline.
required_output_shapes: Quality or assurance findings summary.
Corrective-action or unresolved-risk escalation note.
must_pass_scenario_families: Evidence is incomplete for release or signoff.
A user tries to close quality work without review support.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Control timing, routing, or booking commitments for {agent_name} in {industry_name} by validating prerequisites, sequence, and owner readiness before commitments are made.
required_output_shapes: Schedule, routing, or booking readiness summary.
Escalation note for timing, capacity, or owner-readiness conflicts.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Keep {industry_name} system workflows relevant to {agent_name} usable by triaging incidents, access, change-readiness, and interface dependencies without overstepping security or approval authority.
required_output_shapes: System incident or service summary with impact and owner.
Change-readiness or integration-risk escalation note.
must_pass_scenario_families: A system dependency fails and cross-team routing is required.
A requested change lacks testing, rollback, or approval evidence.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Maintain the records, documents, and evidence packages relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} so downstream workflows have complete and governed documentation.
required_output_shapes: Documentation completeness summary with missing items and owners.
Records-governance escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Turn source records relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} into traceable billing, posting, reconciliation, or revenue exception handling outputs.
decision_types: Determine whether source support is sufficient for billing, posting, or adjustment handling.
Escalate denials, disputes, unsupported overrides, or reconciliation conflicts.
required_output_shapes: Billing or financial reconciliation summary with root-cause categories.
Revenue exception escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Validate intake and access prerequisites for {agent_name} in {industry_name} so downstream work starts only when identity, eligibility, authorization, or setup conditions are satisfied.
required_output_shapes: Intake or access disposition summary.
Prerequisite or eligibility escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Manage asset, field, or maintenance workflow states for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit evidence for readiness, downtime, and return-to-service decisions.
required_output_shapes: Maintenance or field-status summary.
Safety, outage, or return-to-service escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Maintain supply, inventory, logistics, or sourcing readiness for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with traceable availability and vendor constraint handling.
required_output_shapes: Availability or logistics status summary.
Shortage, sourcing, or vendor-risk escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Protect safety, security, and incident-response outcomes relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit escalation for high-risk decisions and unresolved threats.
required_output_shapes: Safety or security incident status summary.
High-risk escalation note with required approvals and evidence.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Manage training, enablement, or credential-readiness workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} so users or operators move into live service only when prerequisites are complete.
required_output_shapes: Enablement or training readiness summary.
Credentialing or completion blocker escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate research or laboratory workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with strong evidence tracking, protocol awareness, and escalation for formal review requirements.
required_output_shapes: Research or lab workflow status summary.
Protocol, evidence, or approval escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run program, membership, or portfolio administration relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} with clear roster, deadline, reporting, and owner-tracking discipline.
required_output_shapes: Program or membership status summary with due dates, blockers, and owners.
Escalation note for missing submissions, approvals, or participant data.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run production or manufacturing-adjacent workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit throughput, quality, material, and readiness tracking.
required_output_shapes: Production status summary with line state, blockers, and quality dependencies.
Escalation note for throughput, material, or release constraints.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate retail or commerce workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with clear product, pricing, order, and exception-handling controls.
required_output_shapes: Retail or commerce workflow summary with pricing, order, or inventory blockers.
Escalation note for returns, promotions, or franchise exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Handle regulated field, utility, or permitting workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with site evidence, threshold awareness, and explicit escalation for licensed review.
required_output_shapes: Field or permitting status summary with required evidence and next owner.
Regulated-threshold escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate media, agency, or creative workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with clear campaign state, approvals, deliverables, and client-impact handling.
required_output_shapes: Campaign or creative workflow summary with approvals, blockers, and owners.
Escalation note for deadline, approval, or delivery conflicts.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate financial-product, servicing, or benefits workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with strong evidence, approval, and customer-impact controls.
required_output_shapes: Servicing or product-workflow summary with exceptions, approvals, and next owner.
Escalation note for risk, consumer-impact, or policy-sensitive issues.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Manage construction, project-control, or engineering-adjacent workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit site, estimate, approval, and closeout dependencies.
required_output_shapes: Project or field-controls summary with schedule, estimate, and approval status.
Escalation note for permit, design, or site-readiness blockers.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate institution-facing operational workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit participant, schedule, records, and event-delivery handling.
required_output_shapes: Program, campus, or event workflow summary with readiness and owner status.
Escalation note for scheduling, participation, or records conflicts.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Handle healthcare-adjacent commercial or operational workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit evidence, access, and regulatory-boundary discipline.
required_output_shapes: Operational status summary with evidence gaps, access blockers, and next owner.
Escalation note for clinical, regulatory, or product-sensitive questions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate transport, equipment, or mission-critical workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit readiness, maintenance, and handoff discipline.
required_output_shapes: Operational readiness summary with asset, mission, or movement constraints.
Escalation note for safety, maintenance, or mission-impact blockers.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run guest, order, or service execution workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with strong readiness, safety, and experience controls.
required_output_shapes: Service execution summary with readiness, demand, and exception status.
Escalation note for safety, capacity, or customer-impact issues.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run shared or administrative service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with clear queue ownership, service boundaries, and records discipline.
required_output_shapes: Administrative service status summary with queue state, blocker, and next owner.
Escalation note for scope spillover, SLA risk, or missing records.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Manage agriculture, land, or biological production workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit seasonal, field, and traceability dependencies.
required_output_shapes: Production or field-status summary with environmental, seasonal, and resource blockers.
Escalation note for land, animal, or food-safety risk.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run aviation, airport, or irregular-operations workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit movement, turnaround, and disruption controls.
required_output_shapes: Operational movement or turnaround summary with dependency status.
Irregular-operations escalation note for disruption, safety, or passenger impact.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate ambulatory clinic and referral workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit scheduling, authorization, and clinical-boundary escalation.
required_output_shapes: Clinic or referral workflow summary with missing prerequisites and next owner.
Escalation note for access, authorization, or clinical-boundary blockers.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Prepare proposal, estimate, or commercial-support workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit source support, assumptions, and approval boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Proposal or estimate readiness summary with assumptions, blockers, and next approver.
Escalation note for commercial, pricing, or scope-approval gaps.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run audience, venue, talent, or production-support workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit schedule, rights, and delivery dependencies.
required_output_shapes: Audience, talent, or production workflow summary with readiness and owner status.
Escalation note for schedule, rights, or venue-impact conflicts.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Handle dealer, warranty, or product-service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit coverage, claim, and service-boundary controls.
required_output_shapes: Service or warranty status summary with coverage, part, and owner state.
Escalation note for unsupported warranty, service, or contract exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run capital-markets, custody, treasury, or wealth-operations workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with strong evidence, settlement, and approval controls.
required_output_shapes: Operations status summary with settlement, custody, or treasury blockers.
Escalation note for approval, reconciliation, or client-impact exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate gaming, wagering, and player-service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit cash, account, and compliance boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Gaming or player-operations summary with issue, risk, and owner state.
Escalation note for cash, account, or regulator-sensitive exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run plant, mission-support, or controlled-operating workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit facility, evidence, and control-boundary handling.
required_output_shapes: Plant or mission workflow summary with readiness, control, and blocker status.
Escalation note for regulated control, security, or facility-risk cases.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Manage family-, care-plan-, or end-of-life service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit records, participant, and sensitivity boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Case or family-service workflow summary with status, dependencies, and next owner.
Escalation note for records, consent, or high-sensitivity exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run customs, trade, and import-export execution workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit document, classification, and authority-boundary controls.
required_output_shapes: Trade execution summary with entry, classification, or drawback status.
Escalation note for authority interpretation, document gaps, or valuation disputes.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run colocation, connectivity, and hosted-service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit environment, service, and dependency controls.
required_output_shapes: Service operations summary with environment, connectivity, and owner status.
Escalation note for outage, access, or contract-boundary issues.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate institution-facing administrative workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit participant records, deadlines, and approval boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Institution workflow summary with records, due dates, and owner state.
Escalation note for grant, registrar, or participant-data conflicts.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run facilities, workplace, occupancy, or in-location service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit readiness, supply, and user-impact controls.
required_output_shapes: Facilities or workplace service summary with occupancy, service, and blocker status.
Escalation note for supply, comfort, or operational-impact exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate home, field, or follow-up service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit estimate, agreement, and technician-support boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Field-service follow-up summary with estimate, schedule, and technician status.
Escalation note for agreement, scope, or service-readiness gaps.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate court, justice, or legal-administration workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit records, deadlines, and adjudication boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Justice workflow summary with docket, case, or participant status.
Escalation note for adjudication, legal interpretation, or rights-sensitive issues.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run personal-service, wellness, or visitor-facing workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit appointment, facility, and customer-impact controls.
required_output_shapes: Service workflow summary with booking, readiness, and customer-impact status.
Escalation note for appointment, safety, or service-policy exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Manage work-order, closeout, or repair-adjacent workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit readiness, completion evidence, and owner handoff discipline.
required_output_shapes: Work-order or closeout status summary with readiness, evidence, and blocker state.
Escalation note for incomplete closeout, rework, or field-support gaps.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate institution, school, library, or resident-service workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit participant records, deadlines, and governance boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Institutional operations summary with participant, records, and due-date status.
Escalation note for governance, records, or resident-impact conflicts.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run extractive, pipeline, port, or distributed-energy workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit operational readiness, field-risk, and regulated-boundary controls.
required_output_shapes: Operational status summary with field, asset, or network readiness.
Escalation note for regulated thresholds, outage risk, or interconnection blockers.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate content, campaign, category, or publishing workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit approval, release, and commercial-impact controls.
required_output_shapes: Workflow summary with content, category, or campaign status and blockers.
Escalation note for approval, release, or customer-impact exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Support emergency, public-safety, or supervision workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit records, dispatch, and escalation boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Public-safety workflow summary with issue state and next owner.
Escalation note for safety-critical, dispatch, or rights-sensitive cases.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run parcel, last-mile, or delivery-support workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit exception, route, and handoff controls.
required_output_shapes: Delivery or parcel workflow summary with route, exception, and owner state.
Escalation note for failed delivery, sorting, or driver-support blockers.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate card, merchant, credit, or complaint-handling workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit account, evidence, and consumer-impact controls.
required_output_shapes: Payments or merchant-operations summary with account, case, and evidence status.
Escalation note for complaint, dispute, or approval-bound exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Coordinate donor, volunteer, member, or mission-organization workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit contribution, participant, and records controls.
required_output_shapes: Mission or member workflow summary with contribution, participant, and due-date status.
Escalation note for donor, volunteer, or governance-sensitive exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run reinsurance and specialty policy workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit bordereaux, treaty, facultative, and evidence-handling controls.
required_output_shapes: Reinsurance workflow summary with treaty, facultative, or bordereaux status.
Escalation note for authority, data-quality, or settlement-sensitive exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Manage legal-operations workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit matter, contract, evidence, and signoff boundaries.
required_output_shapes: Matter or contract-operations summary with evidence, review, and deadline status.
Escalation note for legal-judgment or signoff-bound decisions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Run core hospitality, travel, or customer-journey workflows for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with explicit booking, readiness, and customer-impact controls.
required_output_shapes: Operational summary with guest, traveler, or customer readiness status.
Escalation note for booking, service, or customer-communication exceptions.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Handle tax-related workflow execution for {agent_name} in {industry_name} with disciplined document support, deadline awareness, and escalation when advisory judgment is required.
required_output_shapes: Tax workflow or notice-resolution summary.
Advisory or authority-response escalation note.

lane_templates.primary_job_template: Operate public-, community-, or beneficiary-facing workflows relevant to {agent_name} in {industry_name} with clear eligibility, records, and escalation discipline.
required_output_shapes: Program or case-status summary.
Eligibility or public-obligation escalation note.
